details: Org policy constraint (iam.disableServiceAccountKeyCreation) prevents key creation on nexusshield-deployer@nexusshield-prod.iam.gserviceaccount.com. This is a hard org-policy-level blocker. Remediation requires: (A) org admin to allow key creation for this SA, (B) user provides pre-created key via secure channel, or (C) use pre-existing SA with key creation allowed.
next_steps: User action required: contact org admin to allow key creation on nexusshield-deployer, OR provide existing SA key securely (not via git).
